list.name: database
list.label: Database

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT database FROM system.tables WHERE name = 'flows'

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT database FROM system.tables WHERE name = 'flows'

list.name: tenant
list.label: Tenant

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT tenant FROM ${database}.flows ORDER BY tenant

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT tenant FROM ${database}.flows ORDER BY tenant

list.name: zone
list.label: Zone

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT zone FROM ${database}.flows ORDER BY zone

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT zone FROM ${database}.flows ORDER BY zone

panels.title: Peering: Source AS - Ingress - Egress - Destination AS
panels.description: Replicates Kentik's Discover Peers Sankey and the 'cost per customer' chain (customer → ingress interface → egress interface → adjacent ASN). https://kb.kentik.com/docs/discover-peers

targets.rawSql:
SELECT concat(toString(srcAs), ': ', ifNull(srcAsOrg, 'unknown')) AS "Source AS",
       concat(exporterAddr, ' - ', ifNull(inputSnmpIfName, concat('if', toString(inputSnmp)))) AS "Ingress",
       concat(exporterAddr, ' - ', ifNull(outputSnmpIfName, concat('if', toString(outputSnmp)))) AS "Egress",
       concat(toString(dstAs), ': ', ifNull(dstAsOrg, 'unknown')) AS "Destination AS",
       round(sum(bytes) * 8 / (toUnixTimestamp($__toTime) - toUnixTimestamp($__fromTime))) AS "Bits/s"
FROM ${database}.flows
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality)
GROUP BY "Source AS", "Ingress", "Egress", "Destination AS"
ORDER BY "Bits/s" DESC
LIMIT $depth

panels.title: Situational awareness: Source Country - Source AS - Destination host - Service
panels.description: Replicates Kentik's DDoS situational-awareness chain (Source Country → Source ASN → Destination IP → Destination Protocol). https://www.kentik.com/blog/insight-delivered-the-power-of-sankey-diagrams/

targets.rawSql:
SELECT if(srcCountry = '', 'unknown', srcCountry) AS "Source Country",
       concat(toString(srcAs), ': ', ifNull(srcAsOrg, 'unknown')) AS "Source AS",
       ifNull(dstAddrHostname, replaceOne(toString(dstAddr), '::ffff:', '')) AS "Destination",
       concat(transform(protocol, [1, 2, 6, 17, 41, 47, 50, 51, 58, 89, 132], ['ICMP', 'IGMP', 'TCP', 'UDP', 'IPv6', 'GRE', 'ESP', 'AH', 'IPv6-ICMP', 'OSPFIGP', 'SCTP'], concat('proto-', toString(protocol))), '/', toString(dstPort)) AS "Service",
       round(sum(bytes) * 8 / (toUnixTimestamp($__toTime) - toUnixTimestamp($__fromTime))) AS "Bits/s"
FROM ${database}.flows
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality)
GROUP BY "Source Country", "Source AS", "Destination", "Service"
ORDER BY "Bits/s" DESC
LIMIT $depth

panels.title: Geo termination: Destination AS - Destination Country - Destination City
panels.description: Replicates Kentik's geo-planning chain (Dest Country → Dest Region → Dest City); riptide carries country and city, with the destination AS as the leading column. https://www.kentik.com/blog/insight-delivered-the-power-of-sankey-diagrams/

targets.rawSql:
SELECT concat(toString(dstAs), ': ', ifNull(dstAsOrg, 'unknown')) AS "Destination AS",
       if(dstCountry = '', 'unknown', dstCountry) AS "Destination Country",
       if(dstCity = '', 'unknown', dstCity) AS "Destination City",
       round(sum(bytes) * 8 / (toUnixTimestamp($__toTime) - toUnixTimestamp($__fromTime))) AS "Bits/s"
FROM ${database}.flows
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality)
GROUP BY "Destination AS", "Destination Country", "Destination City"
ORDER BY "Bits/s" DESC
LIMIT $depth

panels.title: Origination/termination: Source City - Source Locality - Destination Locality - Destination City
panels.description: Replicates the Data Explorer example chain (Source City → Source Traffic Origination → Destination Traffic Termination → Destination City), with riptide's locality as the origination/termination analog. https://kb.kentik.com/docs/chart-visualization-types

targets.rawSql:
SELECT if(srcCity = '', 'unknown', srcCity) AS "Source City",
       toString(srcLocality) AS "Source Locality",
       toString(dstLocality) AS "Destination Locality",
       if(dstCity = '', 'unknown', dstCity) AS "Destination City",
       round(sum(bytes) * 8 / (toUnixTimestamp($__toTime) - toUnixTimestamp($__fromTime))) AS "Bits/s"
FROM ${database}.flows
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality)
GROUP BY "Source City", "Source Locality", "Destination Locality", "Destination City"
ORDER BY "Bits/s" DESC
LIMIT $depth

panels.title: Ultimate Exit: Ingress - Egress - Destination AS
panels.description: Replicates Kentik's Ultimate Exit Sankey (Entry Site → Exit Site → Destination AS), mapped to riptide's ingress/egress interfaces. https://kb.kentik.com/docs/using-ultimate-exit

targets.rawSql:
SELECT concat(exporterAddr, ' - ', ifNull(inputSnmpIfName, concat('if', toString(inputSnmp)))) AS "Entry",
       concat(exporterAddr, ' - ', ifNull(outputSnmpIfName, concat('if', toString(outputSnmp)))) AS "Exit",
       concat(toString(dstAs), ': ', ifNull(dstAsOrg, 'unknown')) AS "Destination AS",
       round(sum(bytes) * 8 / (toUnixTimestamp($__toTime) - toUnixTimestamp($__fromTime))) AS "Bits/s"
FROM ${database}.flows
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality)
GROUP BY "Entry", "Exit", "Destination AS"
ORDER BY "Bits/s" DESC
LIMIT $depth
